title: Google might not kneecap the Pixel 11a with an old processor
summary: The leak also suggests the Tensor G6 will feature a more reliable MediaTek modem. Rather than the Tensor G5 found in the Pixel 10 and 10 Pro , the Pixel 10a shipped with the previous generation Tensor G4.
